subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast newly blossomed in the bower of God's love! Render thanks unto Him that thou hast come into being from the seed of His loved ones
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نو کل حدیقه محبت الله حمد کن خدا را که از صلب احباء وجود یافتی و از ثدی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @service to others; to the Cause of God
